name: idfkit
description: EnergyPlus building energy modeling plugin with skills and MCP tooling for creating, validating, and simulating IDF models.

interface.shortDescription: Create, validate, and simulate EnergyPlus models
interface.longDescription: Use idfkit to create new EnergyPlus building models, inspect and validate IDF content, manage weather data, and run simulations through a local MCP server and focused modeling skills.
defaultPrompt: Create a new EnergyPlus model for a small office in Boston
Validate this IDF and explain the blocking errors
Run an annual simulation and summarize the results
